- Color reference: background is #fff and accent #1a2b3c — neither should be a tag
- Link to https://example.com/page#section-anchor — the URL fragment is not a tag
- Inline `code with #not-a-tag inside backticks`
	- ```
	  # Heading-like line inside a fenced code block — NOT a tag
	  #also-not-a-tag
	  ```
- Real tag at the end works: #legit
